note: Values may exceed 100% when children who are older or younger than the official age group also enroll.
title: Share of women enrolled in tertiary education
subtitle: Shown as the [gross enrollment ratio](#dod:gross-enrolment-ratio) — the number of women, regardless of their age, who are enrolled in [tertiary](#dod:tertiary-education) education, expressed as a percentage of women of tertiary education age (typically between 18 and 22 years old).
